name: Mimi's Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, stirring after each addition.
3. Mix in the flour until well combined.
4. Fold in vanilla extract.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Pour mixture into a greased cake pan.
7. Bake for about 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
